body_shape: round cloud-puff shaped body, like a soft stylized cloud with little paws, a long koi-fish tail fin curling behind
mouth_pose: upper front teeth biting firmly onto the middle of the lower lip, mouth almost fully closed with only a thin airy gap, teeth clearly visible pinning the lip down, no tongue visible, /f/ labiodental articulation
sound_gesture: blowing a soft breeze forward, one paw raised palm-up as if catching wind
word_decor: round paper fan held in one paw
soft feather tucked at the crown of the head
expression: serene half-closed meditating eyes, calm mood

voice.character_description: gentle airy voice, older wiser than the others, calm cadence

clips.gentle_retry: Light breath. Feel your top teeth.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You carry my breath now. I am with you.
